speaker: speaker2
text: We have various transportation services . Would you prefer a private vehicle ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , thanks . A taxi is just fine .

speaker: speaker2
text: May I suggest a limo ? It's nice to pamper yourself .

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't want anything except a taxi , thank you .

speaker: speaker2
text: I understand . And where will you be going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: And what time would you like to be picked up ?

speaker: speaker2
text: A taxi will be here shortly , sir .

speaker: speaker1
text: Great ! And remember , a taxi , not a limo .
